user_story: As a System admin, I want to upload login page wallpaper images, so that the login screen shows branded visuals
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Login Page Images screen; When I select an Image type, browse a document and click Save; Then the image is uploaded and shown in the documents list

user_story: As a System admin, I want to choose the image type such as Wallpapers, so that uploaded images are used in the correct context
acceptance_criteria: Given I am uploading a login image; When I select the Image type; Then the upload is categorized accordingly

user_story: As a System admin, I want to delete an existing login page image, so that outdated wallpapers are removed
acceptance_criteria: Given images are listed; When I click Delete on an image; Then it is removed from the documents list

user_story: As a System admin, I want to save and continue to the next setup step, so that I can complete branding within the configuration flow
acceptance_criteria: Given I have uploaded login images; When I click Save & Next; Then changes are saved and the next screen opens
